description.value:
Frequency once per day

Trigger A creature Strikes you with an unarmed attack

Effect You expose the creature to radiation. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|options:damaging-effect,inflicts:sickened] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. On a failure, the creature takes @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1} for 1 minute.
